name: Mike King
reason: Coverage for ai-content-generation-and-prompt-engineering and automated-publishing-and-cicd sub-domains. Founder and CEO of iPullRank, 2025 Search Marketer of the Year by Search Engine Land. Author of The Science of SEO, creator of the AI Search Manual, and pioneer of Relevance Engineering framework. Expert in AI-driven content workflows, RAG, prompt engineering, and content engineering automation.
